Name: Free Rasalhague Republic
Description: The Free Rasalhague Republic is a coreward nation born in the wake of the Fourth Succession War. Rasalhague embraces a unique, democratic system—a stark contrast to the feudal lords of the Inner Sphere. Their immediate focus: sheer survival. Long-term, build an ironclad military and forge strong alliances to no longer be seen as an inviting target of conquest and raiding. The culture of the Free Rasalhague Republic is an amalgam of the original settlers from the Scandinavian regions of old Terra and the Japanese-dominated culture of the Draconis Combine. The current leader of the Republic is Prince Magnusson.
ReputationStatements: You are here because our regular forces are stretched thin. Do not make that worse.
We prefer soldiers we know. Unfortunately, the war has made us less selective.
Mercenary companies come and go. Our people are the ones who stay behind when worlds burn.
You will receive full tactical data on arrival. Read it carefully.
This operation buys time. Right now, time is worth more than territory.
Most mercenaries chase easy contracts. You came north anyway. We respect that.
Our officers trust your judgment under pressure. That trust was earned.
MissionSuccessStatements: The enemy advanced elsewhere today, but not here. Thanks to you.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: You withdrew in good order and preserved your forces under impossible pressure. Command understands the decision.
BadFaithFailureStatements: You abandoned the operation before its completion. That cost lives.
